_comment: Pre-existing migration version-drift pairs (repo filename stamp differs from the production schema_migrations version for the same migration name). These predate the 2026-07-22 governance milestone and were introduced by prior sessions applying via the Supabase MCP tool. The detector (scripts/check-migration-drift.mjs) ignores baselined pairs so it fails only on NEW drift. Reconciliation for these is an OWNER decision — see docs/productivity/MIGRATION_RECONCILIATION.md. The forbidden shortcut is `supabase migration repair --reverted` (it deletes real history). The safe fix is the same local git-rename used for the milestone's own 4 migrations.
